acquisition method: The Q Exactive Plus was operated in data-dependent acquisition (DDA) mode...
alkylation reagent: alkylated with 55mM iodoacetamide for 45 min at room temperature (RT)...
alkylation concentration: alkylated with 55mM iodoacetamide for 45 min at room temperature (RT)...
cleavage agent: Proteins were subsequently digested with trypsin (Promega, sequencing-grade)...
collision energy: fragmented (collision energy (nCE): 33%) by higher energy collisional dissociation (HCD)...
enrichment method: phosphotyrosine immunoprecipitation (IP) followed by immobilized metal affinity chromatography (IMAC)...
fragmentation method: fragmented (collision energy (nCE): 33%) by higher energy collisional dissociation (HCD)...
instrument: The Q Exactive Plus was operated in data-dependent acquisition (DDA) mode...
labeling: lyophilized peptides were labeled using tandem mas tag (TMT) 10-plex...
reduction reagent: reduced with 10mM dithiothreitol for 30 min at 56°C...
reduction concentration: reduced with 10mM dithiothreitol for 30 min at 56°C...
